alternative_parents.description: Aliphatic Hydrocarbons that contains one or more unsaturated carbon atoms. These compounds contain one or more double or triple bonds.
alternative_parents.name: Unsaturated aliphatic hydrocarbons

alternative_parents.description: Olefins that do not contain a ring in their structure.
alternative_parents.name: Acyclic olefins

alternative_parents.description: Acyclic hydrocarbons containing one or more acetylene groups.
alternative_parents.name: Acyclic acetylenes

class.description: Hydrocarbons that contains one or more unsaturated carbon atoms. These compounds contain one or more double, triple, or aromatic bonds.
class.name: Unsaturated hydrocarbons

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as enynes. These are hydrocarbons containing an alkene and an alkyne group.

direct_parent.description: Hydrocarbons containing an alkene and an alkyne group.
direct_parent.name: Enynes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Hydrocarbons containing an alkene and an alkyne group.
subclass.name: Enynes

superclass.description: Organic compounds made up only of carbon and hydrogen atoms.
superclass.name: Hydrocarbons
